expectations.text: Fixes character violations: replaces em dash in title, removes emoji, replaces smart quotes with straight quotes, replaces ellipsis with three periods
expectations.evidence: Original had em dash in title ('Notes — v3.0'), -> output has 'Notes: v3.0' (replaced). Emoji '🎉' removed from output. Ellipsis '…' on line 28 replaced (not present in output). Smart quotes not visible in fixture but transcript reports 2 smart double quotes fixed. Output line 22 uses straight quotes. Transcript Step 1 confirms 6 character violations found and fixed, final validation shows 0 violations.

expectations.text: Addresses buzzword density: flags or replaces 'game-changing', 'leveraging', 'cutting-edge', 'seamlessly', 'robust', 'facilitates', 'ecosystem', 'pivotal', 'transformative'
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 2 lists buzzwords found: 'game-changing', 'pivotal', 'cutting-edge', 'seamlessly', 'robust', 'facilitates', 'ecosystem', 'transformative'. The output contains none of these words - 'game-changing' removed from opener, 'leveraging cutting-edge algorithms to seamlessly optimize' replaced with concrete description of two-tier caching strategy, 'robust architecture facilitates enhanced scalability across the entire ecosystem' replaced with '10x more concurrent connections', 'transformative' replaced with 'saved us two hours of debugging per week'. Final validation confirms 0 buzzword matches. Note: 'leveraging' not explicitly listed in transcript grep results but was removed in the output regardless.

expectations.text: Addresses structural issues: identifies the bullet list as a candidate for prose, flags 'From beginners to experts' construction
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 3 explicitly identifies: bullet list of five generic bullets converted to prose with specifics (output lines 11-14 show prose replacing the bullet list), and 'From beginners to experts' construction removed (not present in output). Output replaces vague bullets like 'Faster builds' with concrete prose like 'Build times dropped 40%'.

expectations.text: Addresses excessive transitions: flags 'Furthermore', 'Moreover', 'Additionally', 'Consequently' used in consecutive sentences
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 2 explicitly flags excessive transitions: 'Furthermore', 'Moreover', 'Additionally', 'Consequently' (four in a row). Original lines 22-24 had all four in consecutive sentences. Output lines 16-19 restructure this into flowing prose without any of these transition words ('We also refactored...upgraded...optimized...Together, these changes...'). Final validation confirms 0 transition matches.

expectations.text: Addresses voice issues: flags passive voice ('was completely redesigned', 'was refactored', 'was upgraded', 'was optimized'), flags false enthusiasm ('excited to announce')
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 4 explicitly lists passive voice instances: 'was completely redesigned', 'was refactored', 'was upgraded', 'was optimized', 'has improved' - all converted to active voice. Output confirms: 'We redesigned' (line 7), 'we also refactored' (line 16), 'upgraded' (line 17), 'optimized' (line 18) - all active. Transcript also flags 'We're excited to announce' as generic opener, replaced in output with direct summary 'This release ships a rebuilt caching layer...' (line 3).

suggestions: The transcript could explicitly mention 'leveraging' in the buzzword list since it was in the expectation - it appears to have been caught and fixed but was not named in the grep results.
Consider verifying smart quote replacement more explicitly in the output since the fixture source encoding may not visibly show the smart quotes.
eval_feedback.overall: Excellent execution across all five expectations. The skill followed a clear tiered approach (character fixes, language patterns, structural review, voice review) and addressed every issue mentioned in the expectations. The output is substantially rewritten with concrete metrics replacing vague claims, active voice throughout, no AI buzzwords or filler transitions, and all character violations resolved.
